title: HardwareSpecRefine
description: Result of applying critical-only fixes to a hardware specification

refined_spec.description: The full spec document text with critical fixes applied

changes.description: One entry per critical issue addressed

issue_id.description: The issue ID from the review, e.g. ISS-001

status.description: Whether the fix was applied or deferred

original_text.description: The original text before the fix

revised_text.description: The corrected text after the fix (empty if deferred)

rationale.description: Why this change resolves the issue, or why it was deferred

total_critical_issues.description: Total number of critical issues from the review

deferred.description: Number of fixes deferred due to insufficient info

description.description: Brief summary of what was changed and what was deferred
